items.question: Which declaration creates a block-scoped variable that cannot be reassigned?
items.explanation: const is block-scoped and disallows reassignment of the binding.

items.question: What does typeof [] evaluate to?
items.explanation: Arrays are objects; use Array.isArray() to detect them.

items.question: How many primitive types does JavaScript have?
items.explanation: string, number, boolean, null, undefined, bigint, symbol.
